# Dudley Development

> Dudley Development is an independent iOS app studio. We build small, polished, playful apps for iPhone — mostly funny, sometimes useful. Every app is free, runs without an account, and keeps your data on your device. Founded and run by Nicholas Santulli.

## Apps

- [Monetary Policy: Independence Day](https://dudleyapps.com/apps/monetary-policy-independence-day/): A free satirical iPhone economics game — a 100-level Independence Day campaign that turns Fed policy into micro-game chaos with a new cast. Live on the App Store. Requires iOS 16.6+.
- Dude, Where's This House?: A free iPhone geography game built for HomeLight — drop into a residential Street View, study the block, and pin where in the world you think you are. Live on the App Store. Requires iOS 17+.
- [VibeRater: Aura](https://dudleyapps.com/apps/vibe-rater/): A free iPhone entertainment app that rates your vibe from a selfie, regular photo, squad shot, or pet pic. Get your archetype (Main Character, Final Boss, Quiet Luxury, Cottagecore, and more), an aura color, a tailored six-dimension scorecard, personalized vibe eras, and story-ready share cards. The phone vibrates while it reads you. Photos are sent to the rating service, rated in memory, and never stored. Free with optional one-time ad-free upgrade. Live on the App Store as version 1.1.
- Table Talk: A free iPhone app of beautifully designed conversation-starter cards for date nights, family dinners, and friend groups. No account, works offline. Free with optional ad-free upgrade (in-app purchase). iOS. Launching on the App Store soon.
- Last Human: A free satirical top-down arcade game for iPhone — you're the last human in an AI-automated office, dodging AutoBots to reach the time clock before the timer runs out. Free with optional ad-free upgrade (in-app purchase). iOS. Launching on the App Store soon.
- EconByte: A free iPhone app that explains economics in bite-sized daily cards — inflation, interest rates, GDP, trade — like a smart friend, not a textbook. Educational only, not investment advice. Free with optional ad-free upgrade (in-app purchase). iOS. Launching on the App Store soon.

## Archetypes (Vibe Rater)

Vibe Rater assigns one of several vibe archetypes based on your photo:

- [Main Character Energy](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/main-character/): The protagonist of every room. Confident, intentional presence.
- [Final Boss](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/final-boss/): Peak power. Effortless authority; maxed Main-Character, Rizz, and Serve.
- [Quiet Luxury](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/quiet-luxury/): Understated, expensive elegance with no loud logos.
- [Clean Girl](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/clean-girl/): Minimal, polished, effortless — glowy skin and gold hoops.
- [Dark Academia](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/dark-academia/): Old libraries, tweed, candlelight, intellectual mood.
- [Cottagecore](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/cottagecore/): Soft, rural, slow living. High Aura, peaceful energy.
- [Cozy Goblin](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/cozy-goblin/): Maximally comfortable, endearingly chaotic. Zero Serve, infinite Aura.
- [Rizz](https://dudleyapps.com/archetypes/rizz/): Natural charisma and social magnetism.

## Tools

- [What's My Vibe? Quiz](https://dudleyapps.com/tools/whats-my-vibe/): A free 5-question quiz that reveals your vibe archetype. Powered by Vibe Rater logic.

## Comparisons

- [Best Photo Rating Apps for iPhone (2026)](https://dudleyapps.com/compare/best-photo-rating-apps/): An honest comparison of photo, vibe, and aura rating apps on iPhone.
- [Best Vibe Check Apps for iPhone (2026)](https://dudleyapps.com/compare/vibe-check-apps/): An honest comparison of vibe check and aura apps on iPhone.

## Blog

The Dudley Blog covers internet culture, vibe archetypes, and honest app roundups. Full index: https://dudleyapps.com/blog/ (RSS: https://dudleyapps.com/blog/rss.xml).

- [The Funniest Photo Rating Apps in 2026, Ranked](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/photo-rating-apps-2026/): A genuinely honest roundup of the best photo rating apps on iPhone in 2026 — what they actually do, who they're for, and which one is most likely to make you laugh at your own photo.
- [The Quiet Luxury Era Is Over — Here's What Actually Won](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/quiet-luxury-2026/): Quiet luxury peaked with Succession. By 2024, H&M was selling a 'stealth wealth capsule.' The trend cycle moved on. But the aesthetic's successor isn't what you'd expect — and the archetype remains.
- [In Defense of the NPC (It's a Compliment Now)](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/npc-defense/): NPC started as an internet insult. It became a TikTok content genre. Now 'NPC energy' is a genuine compliment — for people who have mastered the art of not performing for anyone. We explain the full arc.
- [What Your Phone Case Says About Your Vibe](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/phone-case-vibe/): The phone case is the one accessory you chose while panicking about dropping your phone. What that split-second decision reveals about your archetype — according to vibe science (not real science).
- [What Your Federal Reserve Opinion Says About Your Vibe](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/fed-opinion-vibe/): Your gut reaction to a Fed rate decision reveals your archetype. We matched every possible take on monetary policy to a Vibe Rater result.
- [The Best Satirical iOS Games That Actually Respect Your Intelligence](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/best-satirical-ios-games/): Most 'funny' games on the App Store are slot machines with a hat. These six satire games on iPhone are genuinely good — including one about the Federal Reserve.
- [Gorpcore Prophet: The Archetype That Won the 2020s Without Trying](https://dudleyapps.com/blog/gorpcore-prophet-won/): Gorpcore didn't go mainstream. Everyone else went gorpcore. A look at the decade's most unlikely aesthetic winner — and what separates a Gorpcore Prophet from someone who just owns a vest.

## About

Dudley Development is run by a small team and one human (Nicholas Santulli). All apps are free with Google AdMob ads. No accounts required. No first-party analytics or trackers. Ads are non-personalized — no user tracking, no tracking prompt.

## Contact

- Support: support@dudleyapps.com
- General: hello@dudleyapps.com
- Privacy policies: https://dudleyapps.com/privacy/
- Website: https://dudleyapps.com/
